news.title: Unlocking the Sun's Secrets: AI Analyzes 100 Years of Solar Activity Sketches
news.description: [TIMES OF INDIA] India News: Discover how artificial intelligence is transforming century-old solar observations into valuable scientific data, shedding light on long-term solar activity and space weather predictions.

news.title: The Dow hits a record as most of Wall Street rises, but slumping AI stocks keep indexes mixed
news.description: [THE MANILA TIMES] NEW YORK — Most US stocks rose on Thursday, and the Dow Jones Industrial Average rallied to another record, but more drops for computer chip companies and other winners of the artificial-intelligence boom kept indexes mixed.
